visit_summary: Avoid. The listing only uses a stock/retailer photo with no images of the actual used toy in its current condition.
alignment_summary: The description claims the item is 'Used - Good', but the only image provided is a pristine, white-background stock retailer photo.

mismatches.issue: Stock photo used instead of the actual item

reasons.text: The listing relies entirely on a stock/retailer image with no real-world photos of the actual toy.
The description claims the toy is 'Used - Good', but this cannot be verified without real photos.
Crucial components like the removable floorboard, steering wheel, and horn cannot be verified as present or working.

seller_questions: Could you please send a few photos of the actual Cozy Coupe in its current condition?
Are there any cracks, heavy fading, or deep scratches on the plastic?
Does the horn still squeak and does the key turn?
seller_message_draft: Hi! I'm interested in the Cozy Coupe. Since the listing shows a stock photo, could you send a couple of pictures of the actual toy so I can see its current condition? Thanks!
limitations: Cannot verify physical wear, plastic fading, or structural cracks.
Cannot confirm if the removable floorboard is actually included.
No real-home context to prove the seller physically possesses the item.
Cannot assess wheel wear or steering functionality from a stock image.
research_recommended: Compare the seller's asking price against the retail price of a brand-new Cozy Coupe.
Check for any active safety recalls on this model of the Little Tikes Cozy Coupe.
future_capability_note: We don't verify prices, recalls, or seller history yet — you'll need to check these yourself. A future version of this product will do that research for you.
